clusters.title: Worker config default parsing is duplicated in the new command

member_findings.title: Worker config default parsing is duplicated in the new command
member_findings.impact: `load_worker_config_defaults` hand-parses `worker_config.json` and `resolve_default_path` separately reimplements part of `dscli start`'s default-filling behavior. Any future change to worker config shape or default path normalization now has to be discovered and updated in multiple commands.
member_findings.fix: Extract the shared worker config value/default resolution into a common CLI helper used by `start` and `logs`, or reuse the existing start-side helper with a narrow wrapper for log resolution.
